element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Enemies become progressively harder to defeat as game advances
Multiple attack options available from early game
Carrots become scarce as game progresses, increasing pressure

element_introduction_order.element: Vertical level design (making your way down)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Shift from horizontal progression to vertical navigation
Environmental hazards tied to superstition mechanic; safes and horses fall
Requires learning attack patterns and vulnerabilities specific to each boss
High-risk move draining health; must be used strategically
Collectible power-ups that stun or instantly defeat enemies
Multi-objective finale: spill all paint, avoid Daffy's three alter-egos, defeat final boss variants
Pure evasion required; one-hit kill threat; cannot be defeated
Alternative movement option; traversal through hidden paths

typical_tension_triggers: Final level with multiple objectives and invincible enemies
Proximity to multiple enemy types with varied projectile threats
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Progressive escalation from left-to-right horizontal navigation to complex vertical challenges and multi-phase boss encounters. Difficulty increases markedly in mid-game through enemy variety and environmental hazards, culminating in final level's three-phase climax

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Holes for diving provide alternative traversal paths; may contain secrets or shortcuts

difficulty_curve.early_game: Basic platforming with simple pig enemies using slingshots. Standard left-to-right progression establishes controls and attack methods
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Introduction of vertical level navigation, electrocuting robots, black cat superstition mechanic with falling safes/horses. Enemy variety increases; health scarcity rises
difficulty_curve.late_game: Boss encounters at level ends requiring pattern learning. Final level contains three-phase Daffy encounter, invincible Duck Dodgers with one-hit kill laser, and multi-objective paint-spilling mechanic
notable_spikes: Mid-game transition to vertical design with robot hazards
Introduction of black cat environmental collapse mechanic
Final level invincible Duck Dodgers encounter requiring pure evasion
Daffy boss variants (Drip-Along vs Robin Hood) based on paint completion

notable_level_patterns.description: Early game levels emphasizing left-to-right progression with simple platforming and basic enemy encounters
Mid-to-late game shift requiring downward navigation while avoiding enemies and environmental hazards
Each level culminates with unique boss requiring learning of attack patterns and vulnerabilities (Toro the Bull, Tasmanian Devil, Elmer Fudd, Marvin the Martian, Yosemite Sam)
Final level contains paint-spilling objectives, three Daffy alter-egos to evade, invincible Duck Dodgers with laser blaster, and conditional final boss (Drip-Along or Robin Hood Daffy)
